scope: blind verify of p200 + p522 + glossary g_453/g_538 post-iter-8 fixes

findings.check: ハウジングサービス coherence jp/zh/en across surface + definition; distinguishable from ホスティングサービス
findings.evidence: surface.zh='服务器托管服务' (托管 = customer-owned-server colocation in CN IT usage), en='Housing Service'; definition jp='他社の敷地内に自社のサーバを置くサービスである', zh='在其他公司场地内放置本公司服务器的服务', en='places one's own servers within another company's premises'. All three languages encode co-location semantics (own server, their facility) and are clearly distinct from p200::2 ホスティング whose definitions encode 'other company's server'.

findings.check: ホスティングサービス coherence and contrast with ハウジング
findings.evidence: surface.zh='主机租用服务' (= renting provider's host), en='Hosting Service'; definition uniformly 'uses servers located in and owned by another company'. Properly inverted from p200::1 (own server vs. their server).

findings.check: EN col[0] cells of CIA table row 1/2/3 for redundant English-word tautology
findings.evidence: rows[1][0].en='Confidentiality'; rows[2][0].en='Integrity'; rows[3][0].en='Availability'. Each EN cell is a single clean label with no doubled English form. The (Confidentiality)/(Integrity)/(Availability) parentheticals appear only in jp/zh cells where they serve as cross-language reference, which is appropriate.

findings.check: g_453 surface matches inheriting page p200 entity 1 surface
findings.evidence: g_453.surface={jp:'ハウジングサービス', zh:'服务器托管服务', en:'Housing Service'} === p200::1.surface; kana_helper.zh_concept='服务器托管服务' coherent; occurrences include 200.

findings.check: g_538 surface matches inheriting page p200 entity 2 surface
findings.evidence: g_538.surface={jp:'ホスティングサービス', zh:'主机租用服务', en:'Hosting Service'} === p200::2.surface; kana_helper.zh_concept='主机租用服务' coherent; occurrences include 200.

findings.check: Table row label col[0] jp/zh include English parenthetical — possible cell-level tautology
findings.evidence: jp '機密性\n(Confidentiality)' and zh '机密性\n(Confidentiality)'. Not tautology in those languages — English form is reference annotation. Consistent with standalone entities p522::0..2 whose surfaces also carry the English in jp.

findings.check: クラウドコンピューティング definition vs ホスティング — only differs in 明確/不明確
findings.evidence: p200::3 definition is structurally identical to p200::2 except '所在が不明確'. Faithful to source-book contrastive framing but stylistically minimal. Not release-impacting; outside the three named audit targets.

verdict: CLEAN — 0 release-impacting defects on the three named audit targets (p200 ハウジング/ホスティング coherence, p522 CIA EN col[0] tautology, glossary g_453/g_538 surface consistency).
